name: Text Animate Demo
visual_summary: A demo component that animates text. It would be used when a developer wants to showcase a text animation effect. This component could be used in the documentation or as a starting point for a project that involves text animations.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready addon component with the following characteristics:

Name: Text Animate Demo
Description: A demo component that animates text. It would be used when a developer wants to showcase a text animation effect. This component could be used in the documentation or as a starting point for a project that involves text animations.
Style: demo
Interactions: 
Tags: text, animation, addon

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { TextAnimate } from "@/registry/magicui/text-animate"

export default function TextAnimateDemo() {
  return (
    <TextAnimate animation="blurInUp" by="character" once>
      Blur in by character
    </TextAnimate>
  )
}
